title: limnorchis brevifolia
intro: Limnorchis brevifolia, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as promoting wound healing. Limnorchis brevifolia is commonly prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions.
